mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month growth in retail sales indicates strengthening household demand and near-term revenue momentum, causing the S&P 500 to earn positive forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot shows RSAFS available as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month RSAFS growth is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in no more than 50% of walk-forward observations.

mechanism_narrative: A rising federal funds rate signals tighter discount-rate conditions and reduced liquidity, causing equity valuation compression and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises by at least 0.25pp over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot shows FEDFUNDS at 0.36 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered tightening episodes produce positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or mean triggered return exceeds unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll gains combined with a falling unemployment rate identify broad labor-income improvement, raising expected consumption and earnings, causing positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot shows UNRATE at 5.0 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint labor-improvement trigger has a walk-forward hit rate below 50% for positive 20-day returns over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer prices with an unchanged policy rate signals falling real policy restraint and future tightening risk, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized growth exceeds 3% while FEDFUNDS 3-month change is <= 0.25pp
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot shows CPIAUCSL available as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered inflation-policy gaps are not followed by below-median 60-day S&P 500 returns in at least 55% of walk-forward instances.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in industrial production indicates weakening real output and operating leverage pressure, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls below its 3-month moving average and its 3-month change is negative
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot shows INDPRO at 103.3759 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO downturn triggers are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp fall in housing starts signals weakening interest-sensitive demand and future construction-linked income softness, causing negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot shows HOUST available as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if 60-day S&P 500 returns after HOUST drawdown triggers are not below the unconditional 60-day mean in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: Slowing real GDP growth combined with accelerating CPI identifies stagflation pressure, reducing margins and valuation multiples, causing negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 year-over-year growth decelerates from the prior quarter while CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized growth rises
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot shows GDPC1 available as of t-6mo
failure_condition: Reject if the stagflation trigger has nonnegative average 60-day excess return versus unconditional returns across walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in the unemployment rate signals abrupt labor-market deterioration and recession-risk repricing, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3pp over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot shows UNRATE at 5.0 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE jump triggers are followed by negative 5-day S&P 500 returns in less than 50% of walk-forward observations.
